name: Apricot & Pineapple Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the apricots according to the package instructions.
2. Add the crushed pineapple, sugar, and salt to the apricots.
3. Cook the mixture slowly for 20 minutes after it begins to boil.
4. Stir frequently to prevent sticking.
5. Pour the jam into sterilized half-pint jelly jars.
